title: Hallelujah
why_this_song: Hallelujah by Jeff Buckley (1994) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 33 times; first heard in: "The baffled king composing Hallelujah"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "It's a cold and it's a broken Hallelujah"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Baby, I've been here before"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Well it goes like this the fourth, the fifth"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I've seen this room and I've walked this floor"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hallelujah" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hallelujah" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I heard there was a secret chord
She tied you to her kitchen chair
But remember, when I moved in you

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That David played and it pleased the Lord
It's a cold and it's a broken Hallelujah

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hallelujah" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hallelujah" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hallelujah" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hallelujah" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Hallelujah" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Hallelujah"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
